text:
Athens Times

—

She posted 2 photos on the instagram, before and after his final in the sport of length at the Olympics, with the well-known presenter celebrating in her own way the gold medal of the Greek champion. Miltos Tentoglou was once again invincible, with the 26-year-old jumper winning the gold medal at the Paris Olympics, making our country once again proud. Many Greeks celebrated – they rejoiced at Tentoglou’s achievement, including Doretta Papadimitriou. The well-known presenter posted 2 photos on her personal account on the instagram, before and after the end of the race, wanting to show the difference of emotions she had, in a particular if anything. See this post on Instagram. “How we start to see final length VS how we end up. Bravo Milto Tentoglou!!! You flew again!” he wrote features on the instagram.

Athens Times

News about Greece and the World.
title: Doretta Papadimitriou celebrated Miltos Tentoglou's gold in her own way at the Olympics - Athens Times
